Component depreciation rows exist beneath the total D&A line, but they are not labelled as COGS or cost-of-sales related; they appear to be breakdown items of the total rather than COGS-specific add-backs.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket consists only of 'Raw materials and consumables' and 'Goods for resale'. candidates.row_label: Depreciation/amortisation and impairment of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Separate operating D&A/impairment line above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows, but it is a total operating line spanning multiple functions and includes impairment, so using it as SG&A-specific D&A would risk overstatement.
Specific amortisation line within the D&A section; could relate to operating overhead/intangibles, but there is no explicit SG&A label and it appears to be part of the broader D&A breakdown.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Other external costs', 'Personnel cost', and 'Other operating expenses'. A separate operating D&A total exists, so D&A is not obviously embedded in those selected rows; however, the available D&A rows are not identified as SG&A-specific and the total includes impairment. With no dedicated SG&A or R&D D&A label, the conservative choice is not to add any row separately.
